title: senecio aizoides
intro: Senecio aizoides, also known as Aizoon, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids. The health benefits of Senecio aizoides include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential anti-cancer and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Senecio aizoides are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
